sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Nong hehpihna hangin kong phat uh hi, Topa
Tua in kote tudongin hong keem hi;
Nangma tungah hong ki-ap-in kong kuun uh hi.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Na sabuai ah an kong um uh hi;
na’ng un ne un” nong cih bangin,
Nang phawkna in ka nei uh hi

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: khomun ne ding, ka kilawm kei uh hi,
A them tawm ding zong kilawm kei ung;
Na hong itna hang bekin a ne thei hi ung.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Nangma sihna thu hong gengen ahi
Genzawh loh na minthanna sung hong tun tahen.
